label: 719 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 117–263, div. K, title CXVIII, § 11808(a)(7)136 Stat. 4165Dec. 23, 2022
notes: Section, R.S. § 4679, provided that no additional salary should be allowed to any civil, military, or naval officer on account of his being employed on the Light-House Board, or being in any manner attached to the light-house service.
